product_details_tab_data.Title: Paloma Picasso Paloma Picasso Mon Parfum EDP Spray 100 ml
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Fragrances › Women › Eau de Parfum
product_details_tab_data.Specific Uses: Spray the fragrance from at least 15-20 centimeters from the area of application. Apply to pulse points.
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Iconic and unique, a perfume that embodies the magnetism of the feminine force, making an unforgettable statement.
product_details_tab_data.Languages: English: Manual; English: Original Language; English
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: ALCOHOL, AQUA / WATER, PARFUM / FRAGRANCE, LINALOOL, ALPHA-ISOMETHYL IONONE, HYDROXYCITRONELLAL, LIMONENE, BENZYL ALCOHOL, HEXYL CINNAMAL, EUGENOL, ETHYLHEXYL SALICYLATE, BUTYL METHOXYDIBENZOYLMETHANE, GERANIOL, CITRONELLOL, DIETHYLAMINO HYDROXYBENZOYL HEXYL BENZOATE, BENZYL BENZOATE, BENZYL SALICYLATE, FARNESOL, CITRAL, COUMARIN, CINNAMYL ALCOHOL, TRIS (TETRAMETHYLHYDROXYPIPERIDINOL) CITRATE, ISOEUGENOL, BENZYL CINNAMATE, CINNAMAL, CI 19140 / YELLOW 5, CI 14700 / RED 4, CI 61570 / GREEN 5
